checklist.item: Form I-20 from a SEVP-certified US institution
SEVIS I-901 fee receipt (USD 350 ≈ ₹29,000)
DS-160 Online Nonimmigrant Visa Application (completed & printed)
MRV visa fee payment confirmation (USD 185 ≈ ₹15,400)
Valid Indian passport (valid for at least 6 months beyond intended stay)
One recent passport-size photograph (2x2 inch, white background)
Bank statements showing sufficient funds (last 6 months)
Sponsor letter with income proof (if applicable)
Scholarship/funding letter (if applicable)
Official academic transcripts (10th, 12th, undergraduate)
GRE/GMAT score report (for graduate programs)
TOEFL/IELTS score report
US consulate visa interview appointment confirmation
Ties to home country evidence (family, property, job offer)

UK.processing_time: 3–8 weeks from the date of online application

checklist.item: CAS (Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies) number from UK university
Online UK Student visa application (on Gov.uk)
Visa fee payment (GBP 490 ≈ ₹52,500) + IHS surcharge (GBP 776/year)
Valid Indian passport
Biometric appointment at VFS Global (India)
Bank statements showing: tuition + £1,334/month (London) or £1,023/month (elsewhere) for 28 days
Funds held continuously for 28 days before application
IELTS Academic / UKVI IELTS score (usually Band 6.0+)
Official academic transcripts and certificates
ATAS certificate (if studying sensitive subjects like aerospace, nuclear)
TB test certificate from approved clinic (mandatory for India)

Germany.processing_time: 6–12 weeks; apply at least 3 months before start date

checklist.item: University admission letter (Zulassungsbescheid)
Completed national visa application form (signed in presence of consulate)
Visa fee (EUR 75 ≈ ₹6,800)
Valid Indian passport + two copies of all pages
Two recent biometric photos
Blocked account (Sperrkonto) showing EUR 11,208 (2024 amount) e.g., Fintiba, Deutsche Bank, Coracle
Health insurance valid in Germany (Techniker Krankenkasse, AOK, etc.)
Certified translated copies of marksheets (10th, 12th, degree)
German language proficiency proof (TestDaF / DSH) or English proof (IELTS/TOEFL)
Statement of Purpose / Motivation Letter
CV/Resume in Europass format
APS certificate (Akademische Prüfstelle) — mandatory for Indian students
Campus France pre-registration and interview certificate
Visa application via France-Visas portal
Visa fee (EUR 99 ≈ ₹9,000) — often reduced with Campus France
Valid passport (min 3 months beyond stay)
Two recent passport photographs
Bank statements showing EUR 615/month (minimum maintenance funds)
Housing proof (university residence confirmation or rental contract)
Enrollment letter from French institution
French/English proficiency test scores
Academic transcripts and diplomas (translated to French if required)

Netherlands.processing_time: University applies on your behalf; usually 4–8 weeks

checklist.item: Unconditional offer letter from a Dutch institution (recognized by IND)
University submits MVV application to IND on your behalf
Entry visa (MVV) fee (EUR 210 ≈ ₹18,700)
Valid passport (min 6 months beyond stay)
Biometric passport-size photos (35x45mm)
Proof of sufficient funds (EUR 860/month in a Dutch bank or scholarship letter)
Academic transcripts and degree certificates
English proficiency (IELTS 6.5+ or TOEFL 90+)
Tuberculosis test (EVT) from approved clinic
CoE (Confirmation of Enrolment) from Australian institution
Online visa application via ImmiAccount
Visa application charge (AUD 650 ≈ ₹36,000)
Valid Indian passport
Proof of funds: AUD 21,041/year tuition + AUD 21,041 living + travel
OSHC (Overseas Student Health Cover) insurance
Academic transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor)
English proficiency: IELTS 6.0+ overall
Overseas student health cover (OSHC)
Health examination (if requested) via panel physician
Police clearance certificate from India (if 12+ months in country)
Offer letter from Singapore educational institution (must be registered with ICA)
Online SOLAR (Student's Pass Online Application & Registration) form
Student's Pass fee (SGD 30 ≈ ₹1,900) + eIMM8A card SGD 60 ≈ ₹3,900
Valid passport (min 6 months beyond STP expiry)
Recent passport photograph (35x45mm, white background)
Evidence of sufficient funds for tuition and living expenses
Academic transcripts and certificates (certified copies)
English test scores if medium of instruction was not English
Medical examination report (if required by institution)
Unconditional offer letter from a Hong Kong institution
Form ID 995A (Application for Entry for Study) submitted by university sponsor
No visa fee (waived for most nationalities including India)
Valid passport
Recent passport photograph
Proof of sufficient funds for study and living expenses
Academic transcripts and certificates
English proficiency if applicable
Police clearance (if required by institution)
Letter of acceptance from accredited Spanish university/institution
National visa application form (EX-00)
Visa fee (EUR 80 ≈ ₹7,300)
Valid passport (2+ passport photos)
Proof of financial means (EUR 600/month or study grant letter)
Travel and health insurance (covering entire stay in Spain)
Certified academic certificates (translated to Spanish)
Spanish language proficiency (DELE) or program taught in English with proof
Medical certificate (in Spanish) confirming no contagious diseases
Apostilled Indian Police Clearance Certificate

Switzerland.visa_type: Swiss National Visa (Category D) for Study

checklist.item: University acceptance letter from Swiss institution
National visa application form (via Swiss Embassy New Delhi)
Visa fee (CHF 82 ≈ ₹7,500)
Valid passport + 2 copies of ID page
Two recent biometric photos
Proof of funds: CHF 21,000 blocked account or scholarship letter
Health insurance valid in Switzerland
Academic certificates and transcripts
Language certificate (German B2/C1 for German programs; English IELTS 6.5 for English programs)
Indian Police Clearance Certificate

Finland.processing_time: 6–8 weeks; apply via Enter Finland portal

checklist.item: Acceptance letter from Finnish university (must be registered)
Online application via Enter Finland (enterfinland.fi)
Permit fee (EUR 400 ≈ ₹36,300)
Valid passport (scan + original)
Passport-size photo
Show EUR 560/month (EUR 6,720/year) in bank account or scholarship
Proof of payment of tuition fees (if applicable)
Academic transcripts (notarized copies)
English/Finnish proficiency certificate
Valid travel insurance until residence permit is processed
